system_launch.purpose: Orchestrates the full AILCC stack (Relay, Orchestrator, Dashboard).

full_diagnostics.purpose: Performs an end-to-end health check of all system components.

persistence_manager.purpose: Handles low-level data persistence for agent memory.

relay_server.purpose: WebSocket and HTTP relay for real-time dashboard updates.

neurologic_sync.purpose: React context provider for neural state synchronization.

the_judge.purpose: Autonomous advisor for system health and strategic feedback.

linear_cns_sync.purpose: Synchronizes Linear issues with the Local Markdown CNS registry.

report_gen.purpose: Converts Markdown/Text content into professional PDF or Word documents.

grok_proxy.purpose: Bridges web-reading context for Grok/Valentine sessions.

academic_defense.purpose: Executes deconstruction and voice injection for academic integrity defense.

grok_status_check.purpose: Monitors Grok web-reading availability and updates system status.
